behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, because failure appears at summary-write path + findings-store handoff (not just one pure function). PASS2-AUDIT: Unit is too low since bug is cross-module trust mismatch; System rejected because behavior text only says "stored ... finding" and "summary" (no real OS/network/subprocess requirement); Agentic rejected because no model-output correctness is involved; Workflow rejected because no multi-agentic sequence is required. FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Wire review-summary service to a real in-process findings repository (test DB/file-backed repo). Seed one FAIL finding for the round, attempt to store PASS summary, assert write is rejected and reason references stored FAIL.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, since gate computation must be exercised with repository read + summary input together. PASS2-AUDIT: Unit rejected because behavior explicitly requires data source choice across module boundary (gate vs stored findings). System rejected by text "stored findings" with no external infra dependency. Agentic rejected because verdict rule is deterministic over stored records, not LLM quality. Workflow rejected because no multi-agentic chain. FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Run gate computation with conflicting inputs: summary text says all PASS, stored findings include at least one FAIL. Assert gate returns non-PASS based on stored findings, proving it does not trust summary-only text.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, because validation + persistence of audit warning spans modules. PASS2-AUDIT: Unit rejected since behavior includes side effect "produce auditable warning record" beyond local logic. System rejected because behavior text does not require real OS/network/subprocess sink. Agentic rejected because no model decision quality required. Workflow rejected because single-step policy enforcement. FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Exercise summary submission endpoint/service with and without override flag. Without flag, reject manual override. With flag, accept and assert an audit warning record is persisted with actor, round, and override metadata.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the gate requires a review round identifier produced after the latest fix commit before PASS can be finalized.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, because this is state correlation across fix-commit metadata and review-round metadata. PASS2-AUDIT: Unit rejected since failure is in cross-entity freshness check. System considered and rejected: behavior text says "identifier produced after the latest fix commit" but does not require real git subprocess/network; synthetic commit IDs/timestamps in local store can expose bug. Agentic rejected: requirement is temporal/order validity, not model-output quality. Workflow rejected: no required multi-agentic sequence in this behavior text alone. FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Seed latest-fix commit marker, then test two rounds: one older/equal to fix commit and one newer. Assert PASS finalization is blocked for stale round ID and allowed only for post-fix round ID.

behaviors.description: In the live review loop, PASS cannot finalize unless a fresh review-agent round runs on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Agentic, because behavior explicitly requires a real "review-agent round" in live loop, and a stubbed round can hide failures where no real model call occurs on updated diff. PASS2-AUDIT: Integration considered but rejected by behavior text "live review loop" + "review-agent round runs"; this is not only wrapper plumbing. System alone is insufficient because subprocess/HTTP checks still miss model-dependent execution path. Workflow rejected because behavior requires freshness of at least one real agentic round, not a multi-agentic chain outcome. FINAL: Agentic.
behaviors.test_description: Run an end-to-end live review-loop scenario against real review-agent call on an updated diff. Verify PASS finalization fails if no post-update agent round exists, then succeeds only after a new real agent round is executed and recorded.

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, the outcome is escalation rather than PASS.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Integration, since this is decision logic over stored findings + round-budget state. PASS2-AUDIT: Unit rejected because exhaustion status and stored MUST-FIX findings are typically produced/consumed across modules. System rejected: no real OS/network/subprocess needed by behavior text. Agentic rejected: correctness does not depend on model output quality once findings are stored. Workflow rejected: no requirement to execute multiple real agentic steps in this test; can be reproduced via stored state setup. FINAL: Integration.
behaviors.test_description: Set round counter to exhausted and persist unresolved MUST-FIX findings. Invoke outcome resolver and assert escalation status is returned and PASS is blocked.

behaviors.description: In a live multi-round review workflow, exhausted rounds with unresolved MUST-FIX findings still block PASS and emit escalation.
behaviors.justification: PASS1 provisional: Workflow, because behavior explicitly says "live multi-round review workflow" and outcome depends on sequenced rounds plus final gate decision. PASS2-AUDIT: Agentic alone rejected by text "multi-round" (more than one agentic step required). Integration rejected because mocked rounds can hide state-carryover/retry-loop failures across rounds. System rejected as too low: real infra without real multi-step agent loop still misses intended boundary. FINAL: Workflow.
behaviors.test_description: Execute a real multi-round review pipeline: run rounds until budget exhausted on an updated PR/diff, keep unresolved MUST-FIX findings in stored results, then assert final state blocks PASS and emits escalation event/record.
